title: laburnum spinosum
intro: Laburnum spinosum, also known as the spiny laburnum or angled laburnum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Laburnum spinosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
